__NOTOC__
<div class="cubyz-header">
= Welcome to the Cubyz Wiki! =
'''Your comprehensive guide to the 3D voxel sandbox adventure'''
</div>

== About Cubyz ==
<div class="cubyz-section">
'''Cubyz''' is a 3D voxel sandbox game inspired by Minecraft, featuring innovative mechanics and limitless possibilities.

=== Unique Features ===
{| style="width: 100%; border-radius: 5px;"
|-
| style="width: 33%; padding: 15px; vertical-align: top; border-right: 1px solid #ddd;" |
'''🌍 Level of Detail'''

Play with huge render distances without the huge performance cost.
| style="width: 33%; padding: 15px; vertical-align: top; border-right: 1px solid #ddd;" |
'''📦 3D Chunks'''

Infinite terrain in all directions! Build without limits or explore endless caves.
| style="width: 33%; padding: 15px; vertical-align: top;" |
'''⚒️ Procedural Crafting'''

Create your own tools by combining a variety of unique materials!
|}

<div style="text-align: center; margin-top: 20px;">
[https://github.com/PixelGuys/Cubyz/releases/latest '''📥 Download Cubyz''']
</div>
</div>

== Getting Started ==
<div style="display: flex; gap: 20px; margin-bottom: 20px;">
{| class="wikitable cubyz-box-blue" style="width: 50%;"
|-
! class="cubyz-box-header cubyz-box-header-blue" | 🎮 Game Information
|-
| style="padding: 20px;" |
* [[Installation Guide]]
* [[Controls]]
* [[Game Mechanics]]
* [[Blocks and Items]]
* [[Crafting System|Item Crafting System]]
* [[FAQ]]
|}

{| class="wikitable cubyz-box-orange" style="width: 50%;"
|-
! class="cubyz-box-header cubyz-box-header-orange" | 🔧 For Developers
|-
| style="padding: 20px;" |
* [[Addon Creation Guide]]
* [[API Documentation]]
* [[Modding Tutorials]]
* [[Asset Guidelines]]
* [[Contributing to Cubyz]]
|}
</div>

== Community Resources ==
{| class="wikitable cubyz-box-green" style="width: 100%;"
|-
! class="cubyz-box-header cubyz-box-header-green" colspan="2" | 🌟 Community Hub
|-
| style="width: 50%; padding: 20px; vertical-align: top;" |
=== 📚 Browse Addons ===
* [https://addons.ashframe.net/ Popular Addons]
* [[Texture Packs]]
* [[Mods]]
* [[Maps and Worlds]]
| style="width: 50%; padding: 20px; vertical-align: top; border-left: 1px solid #ddd;" |
=== 🤝 Get Involved ===
* [[Contribute to the Wiki]]
* [https://github.com/PixelGuys/Cubyz GitHub Repository]
* Community {{DiscordLink}}
* [https://github.com/PixelGuys/Cubyz/issues/new?template=bug.yml Report a Bug]
* [https://github.com/PixelGuys/Cubyz/issues/new?template=proposal.yml Suggest Features]
|}

== Quick Links ==
<div class="cubyz-quicklinks">
[[File:logo.png|link=Main Page|50px]] |
[[Installation Guide|Get Started]] | 
[[FAQ]] | 
[[Changelog]] | 
[[Credits]]
</div>

<!--
<div class="cubyz-footer">
''This wiki is maintained by the Cubyz community. Feel free to [[Special:CreateAccount|create an account]] and contribute!''
</div>
-->
